title: STL Comparison Configuration
description: Centralized tolerances and comparison settings for cross-platform STL validation

volume.description: Maximum allowed volume difference as percentage (start loose, tighten after data collection)

surface_area.description: Maximum allowed surface area difference as percentage

bounding_box.description: Maximum allowed bounding box dimension difference in millimeters

max_surface_deviation.description: Maximum allowed surface-to-surface deviation (CloudCompare C2M), tune per feature

watertightness.description: Both meshes must be watertight for 3D printing

face_count.description: Face count is informational only (varies with mesh resolution)

vertex_count.description: Vertex count is informational only (varies with mesh resolution)

icp.description: Run ICP alignment if centroid distance or bbox offset exceeds threshold
icp.description_rms: Fail if ICP RMS exceeds this value (indicates significant geometry mismatch)

coordinate_system.description: Both generators use millimeters, origin varies (card: corner, cylinder: center)

cloudcompare.description_sampling: Number of points to sample from mesh surface for C2M distance
cloudcompare.description_runtime: Maximum time allowed for CloudCompare operations per comparison
cloudcompare.description_directions: Compute C2M in both directions (ref→test and test→ref) for symmetric Hausdorff

tool_versions.comment: See tests/tool_versions.yml for detailed version specifications

performance.comment: Set to true to run test cases in parallel (requires thread-safe OpenSCAD execution)
